headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on Old Dominion Freight Line, Raises Price Target to $241
summary: Raymond James  analyst Patrick Tyler Brown   maintains Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $224 to $241.
